ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pattern_types" (
  "pattern_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pattern type */,
  "pattern_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the pattern type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pattern type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pattern type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pattern type was last updated */,
  "complexity" INTEGER /* Complexity level of the pattern type (e.g., 1 for simple, 2 for moderate, 3 for complex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "propositions" (
  "proposition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proposition */,
  "proposition_name" TEXT /* Name of the proposition (e.g., 'a', 'b') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the proposition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the proposition was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the proposition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proposition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "utterances" (
  "utterance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each utterance */,
  "pattern_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pattern type of the utterance */,
  "proposition_ids" TEXT /* List of proposition IDs used in the utterance */,
  "utterance_text" TEXT /* Text of the utterance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the utterance was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the utterance was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the utterance (e.g., 'user_input', 'dataset') */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context in which the utterance was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utterance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_utterances_pattern_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("pattern_type_id") REFERENCES pattern_types ("pattern_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ltl_representations" (
  "ltl_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LTL representation */,
  "utterance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the utterance the LTL representation belongs to */,
  "true_ltl" TEXT /* True LTL representation */,
  "out_ltl" TEXT /* Output LTL representation */,
  "true_symbolic_ltl" TEXT /* True symbolic LTL representation */,
  "out_symbolic_ltl" TEXT /* Output symbolic LTL representation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the LTL representation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the LTL representation was last updated */,
  "generation_method" TEXT /* Method used to generate the LTL representation (e.g., 'manual', 'automated') */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the LTL representation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ltl_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ltl_representations_utterance_id FOREIGN KEY ("utterance_id") REFERENCES utterances ("utterance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accuracy_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accuracy evaluation */,
  "ltl_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the LTL representation being evaluated */,
  "is_accurate" INTEGER /* Whether the LTL representation is accurate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the accuracy evaluation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the accuracy evaluation was last updated */,
  "evaluated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_method" TEXT /* Method used for the evaluation (e.g., 'human', 'automated') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accuracy_evaluations_ltl_id FOREIGN KEY ("ltl_id") REFERENCES ltl_representations ("ltl_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "placeholder_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each placeholder mapping */,
  "ltl_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the LTL representation the mapping belongs to */,
  "placeholder_map" TEXT /* Map of placeholders to their corresponding symbols */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the placeholder mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the placeholder mapping was last updated */,
  "mapping_description" TEXT /* Description of the mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placeholder_mappings_ltl_id FOREIGN KEY ("ltl_id") REFERENCES ltl_representations ("ltl_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "true_landmarks" (
  "landmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each true landmark */,
  "utterance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the utterance the landmark belongs to */,
  "true_landmark" TEXT /* True landmark */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the true landmark was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the true landmark was last updated */,
  "landmark_type" TEXT /* Type of the landmark (e.g., 'location', 'event') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("landmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_true_landmarks_utterance_id FOREIGN KEY ("utterance_id") REFERENCES utterances ("utterance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "output_landmarks" (
  "landmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output landmark */,
  "utterance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the utterance the landmark belongs to */,
  "output_landmark" TEXT /* Output landmark */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the output landmark was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the output landmark was last updated */,
  "landmark_type" TEXT /* Type of the landmark (e.g., 'location', 'event') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("landmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_output_landmarks_utterance_id FOREIGN KEY ("utterance_id") REFERENCES utterances ("utterance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "landmark_groundings" (
  "grounding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each landmark grounding */,
  "utterance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the utterance the grounding belongs to */,
  "landmark_grounding" TEXT /* Landmark grounding */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the landmark grounding was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the landmark grounding was last updated */,
  "grounding_type" TEXT /* Type of the grounding (e.g., 'location', 'event') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grounding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landmark_groundings_utterance_id FOREIGN KEY ("utterance_id") REFERENCES utterances ("utterance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who interacted with the system */,
  "utterance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the utterance the user interacted with */,
  "interaction_time" TEXT /* Time of the interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user interaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user interaction was last updated */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., 'view', 'edit', 'submit') */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_utterance_id FOREIGN KEY ("utterance_id") REFERENCES utterances ("utterance_id")
)
